criteria.description: Directory structure: meta-tests/ directory exists with helpers/ and helpers/fixtures/ subdirectories
criteria.testSteps: Verify directories exist: meta-tests/, meta-tests/helpers/, meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/
criteria.threshold: All three directories exist

criteria.description: run.sh exists at meta-tests/run.sh and is executable (chmod +x)
criteria.testSteps: Check file exists and has executable permission: test -x meta-tests/run.sh
criteria.threshold: pass/fail

criteria.description: run.sh checks for bats prerequisite and prints install instructions if missing
criteria.testSteps: Temporarily modify PATH to hide bats, run meta-tests/run.sh. Verify it exits non-zero and stderr contains install instruction text mentioning 'bats'.
criteria.threshold: Exit code non-zero and stderr mentions bats installation

criteria.description: run.sh checks for jq prerequisite and prints install instructions if missing
criteria.testSteps: Temporarily modify PATH to hide jq, run meta-tests/run.sh. Verify it exits non-zero and stderr contains install instruction text mentioning 'jq'.
criteria.threshold: Exit code non-zero and stderr mentions jq installation

criteria.description: run.sh discovers and runs all *.bats files under meta-tests/
criteria.testSteps: Run bash meta-tests/run.sh. Verify it invokes bats with all .bats files found in meta-tests/ (not tests/).
criteria.threshold: All .bats files under meta-tests/ are discovered

criteria.description: run.sh exits with code 0 when bats reports all tests pass
criteria.testSteps: Ensure at least one .bats file exists with a passing test. Run bash meta-tests/run.sh. Verify exit code is 0.
criteria.threshold: Exit code 0

criteria.description: run.sh supports --filter argument to run a subset of tests by name pattern
criteria.testSteps: Read run.sh source. Verify it parses a --filter argument and passes it through to bats (via --filter or grep-based selection).
criteria.threshold: --filter flag is handled and used to restrict test execution

criteria.description: test-helper.bash exists at meta-tests/helpers/test-helper.bash and is sourceable by bash
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash -c 'source meta-tests/helpers/test-helper.bash'. Verify exit code 0 (no syntax errors).
criteria.threshold: pass/fail

criteria.description: test-helper.bash setup() creates an isolated temporary directory and sets TEST_TEMP_DIR
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify setup() calls mktemp -d and exports TEST_TEMP_DIR. Verify it changes to that directory.
criteria.threshold: setup() creates temp dir and sets TEST_TEMP_DIR

criteria.description: test-helper.bash setup() sets HARNESS_STATE env var and creates required subdirectories (sprints/, regression/)
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify setup() exports HARNESS_STATE and runs mkdir -p for sprints/ and regression/ subdirectories.
criteria.threshold: HARNESS_STATE is set and both subdirectories are created

criteria.description: test-helper.bash teardown() removes the temporary directory unconditionally
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify teardown() calls rm -rf on TEST_TEMP_DIR.
criteria.threshold: teardown() removes TEST_TEMP_DIR

criteria.description: test-helper.bash provides init_test_repo() that initializes a git repo with an initial commit and sets user.name/email
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify init_test_repo() calls git init, git config user.email, git config user.name, and makes an initial commit.
criteria.threshold: Function exists with git init, config, and initial commit

criteria.description: test-helper.bash provides source_harness_lib() that sources a harness lib file with correct SCRIPT_DIR so sibling imports resolve
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify source_harness_lib() sets SCRIPT_DIR to the harness/lib directory and sources the requested lib file.
criteria.threshold: Function sets SCRIPT_DIR and sources harness/lib/<arg>

criteria.description: test-helper.bash provides install_fixture() that copies a fixture file from meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/ to a destination, creating parent directories
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify install_fixture() creates parent dirs with mkdir -p and copies from the fixtures directory.
criteria.threshold: Function creates parent dirs and copies fixture file

criteria.description: test-helper.bash provides assert_json_field() that asserts a jq field value with clear error messages on failure
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify assert_json_field(FILE, PATH, EXPECTED) uses jq to read the field and compares to expected value, printing clear error on mismatch.
criteria.threshold: Function uses jq, compares values, and prints diagnostic on failure

criteria.description: test-helper.bash provides run_hook() that runs a hook script with empty stdin and captures exit code
criteria.testSteps: Read test-helper.bash. Verify run_hook(HOOK_NAME) pipes empty input to the hook script and captures its exit code.
criteria.threshold: Function exists and handles stdin/exit code

criteria.description: Fixture: config-valid.json exists with all config fields populated (userPrompt, projectType, contextStrategy, model, maxSprintAttempts, maxContractRounds, costCapPerSprint, totalCostCap)
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/config-valid.json. Verify valid JSON with all 8 config fields present and non-empty.
criteria.threshold: All 8 fields present with non-empty values

criteria.description: Fixture: config-minimal.json exists with only required fields (userPrompt, projectType)
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/config-minimal.json. Verify valid JSON with userPrompt and projectType fields.
criteria.threshold: Valid JSON with at least userPrompt and projectType

criteria.description: Fixture: contract-3criteria.json exists with a criteria array containing exactly 3 items with IDs C1-01, C1-02, C1-03
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/contract-3criteria.json. Verify .criteria has length 3 and contains IDs C1-01, C1-02, C1-03.
criteria.threshold: 3 criteria with correct IDs

criteria.description: Fixture: contract-empty-criteria.json exists with an empty criteria array
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/contract-empty-criteria.json. Verify .criteria is an empty array [].
criteria.threshold: .criteria == []

criteria.description: Fixtures: handoff-empty.json (no completed sprints) and handoff-with-sprints.json (2 completed sprints) exist with correct structure
criteria.testSteps: Read both files. Verify handoff-empty.json has .completedSprints as empty array. Verify handoff-with-sprints.json has .completedSprints with 2 entries.
criteria.threshold: Both files valid JSON with correct completedSprints

criteria.description: Fixtures: eval-report-pass.json (overallResult=PASS), eval-report-fail.json (overallResult=FAIL with blocking failures), and eval-report-malformed.json (missing required fields) all exist
criteria.testSteps: Read all three files. Verify pass has overallResult=PASS, fail has overallResult=FAIL with blockingFailures>0, malformed is missing overallResult or criteriaResults.
criteria.threshold: All three files exist with correct characteristics

criteria.description: Fixtures: contract-review-accepted.json (decision=accepted), contract-review-revise.json (decision=revise), contract-review-no-decision.json (missing decision field) all exist
criteria.testSteps: Read all three files. Verify accepted has .decision=accepted, revise has .decision=revise, no-decision is missing .decision field.
criteria.threshold: All three files exist with correct structure

criteria.description: Fixture: sprint-plan-3sprint.json exists with a sprints array containing exactly 3 sprint objects each having number and name fields
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/sprint-plan-3sprint.json. Verify .sprints has length 3 and each entry has .number and .name.
criteria.threshold: 3 sprints with number and name fields

criteria.description: Fixtures: status-active.json, status-ready-for-eval.json, status-blocked.json, and status-pass.json each contain the correct status value
criteria.testSteps: Read each file. Verify status-active.json has .status=active, status-ready-for-eval.json has .status=ready-for-eval, status-blocked.json has .status=blocked, status-pass.json has .status=pass.
criteria.threshold: All four files exist with correct .status values

criteria.description: Fixtures: registry-empty.json (fresh registry with empty sprints object) and registry-populated.json (registry with criteria from 2 sprints) exist
criteria.testSteps: Read both files. Verify registry-empty.json has .sprints as empty object {}. Verify registry-populated.json has .sprints with 2 sprint entries containing criteria arrays.
criteria.threshold: Both files valid JSON with correct structure

criteria.description: Fixture: generator-log.md exists as a sample generator work log with non-empty markdown content
criteria.testSteps: Read meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/generator-log.md. Verify it exists and has non-empty content.
criteria.threshold: File exists and is non-empty

criteria.description: meta-tests/ is structurally independent from tests/: it has its own test-helper.bash and does not source or import from the tests/ directory
criteria.testSteps: Grep all files under meta-tests/ for references to '../tests/', 'tests/helpers', or 'tests/layer'. Verify zero matches. Verify meta-tests/helpers/test-helper.bash is a separate file, not a symlink.
criteria.threshold: Zero references to tests/ directory anywhere in meta-tests/

criteria.description: Running bash meta-tests/run.sh executes successfully (exit 0) with zero or more passing tests and no errors from the infrastructure itself
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh 2>&1. Verify exit code 0. Verify output does not contain 'error' or 'syntax error' from bash/bats infrastructure (test failures are fine at this stage, infrastructure errors are not).
criteria.threshold: Exit code 0, no infrastructure errors

criteria.description: All fixture JSON files are valid JSON (parseable by jq without errors)
criteria.testSteps: Run jq '.' on every .json file in meta-tests/helpers/fixtures/. Verify all exit with code 0.
criteria.threshold: All fixture JSON files parse without errors

outOfScope: Actual test cases for harness functions (Sprint 2-6)
Any changes to existing harness source code or the existing tests/ directory
